name: drawer-demo
visual_summary: The Drawer Demo component is a customizable navigation drawer that can be triggered by a button or other UI element. It features a list of items that can be used to create a responsive and user-friendly interface. This component is ideal for developers looking to add a navigation drawer to their app or website.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready component component with the following characteristics:

Name: drawer-demo
Description: The Drawer Demo component is a customizable navigation drawer that can be triggered by a button or other UI element. It features a list of items that can be used to create a responsive and user-friendly interface. This component is ideal for developers looking to add a navigation drawer to their app or website.
Style: customizable, responsive, material
Interactions: animated, expandable, collapsible
Tags: navigation, drawer, layout, component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
